name: Create Ticket - Functional Consent Enforcement
description: Ensures that the /ticket endpoint only creates a ticket when consent is given and returns appropriate responses.
input: A valid TicketRequest payload with consent True and False.
output: TicketResponse if consent is True, ErrorResponse if consent is False.
success_criteria: Returns TicketResponse with ticket_id when consent is True
Returns ErrorResponse with error_type 'TICKET_CREATION_FAIL' or 'TICKET_NOT_CREATED_NO_CONSENT' when consent is False
error_scenarios: ErrorResponse if required fields are missing or invalid
ErrorResponse if ticket creation fails due to external error
